name: AI Video Script and Production Plan Generator
description: Takes a text topic, researches trending content via Exa, generates a detailed video script with Claude AI including avatar selection and voice notes, and saves the production plan to Google Drive with a Slack notification.

source.originalName: Generate AI videos from text with HeyGen and voice cloning.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for content research

topic.description: Video topic or text to convert into a video script

tone.description: Video tone: professional, casual, educational, entertaining

steps.name: Build Exa query for trending content research
Build Claude prompt for video script generation
Generate video script with Claude AI
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Save production plan to Google Drive
